quote: We had seen audit reports before — this was different. Ranked actions, payback logic and a measurement plan our ops team could run with.

partnerTrust.title: Vetted partners and qualified contractors
partnerTrust.body: Where a project needs specialist installation or product support, we work with partners and contractors who have been checked for suitability, insurance, relevant certifications and the qualifications required for the work. We do not publish a full supplier list because the right team depends on the site, technology and scope, but every recommendation is made with competence, compliance and measured outcomes in mind.
items: Relevant trade qualifications, accreditations and product training checked before recommendation.
Insurance, health and safety expectations and site-readiness considered before work begins.
Green Wing keeps the focus on suitability, measurement and verified savings rather than supplier preference.

reviews.quote: We had seen audit reports before — this was different. Ranked actions, payback logic and a measurement plan our ops team could run with.
